alkylation reagent: alkylated with 25 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 25 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min
collision energy: The normalized collision energy was set at 34% for MS/MS
enrichment method: developed a column-based CD9-antibody-immobilized high-performance liquid chromatography immunoaffinity chromatography
fragmentation method: selected for the tandem MS2 analysis by collision-induced dissociation (CID) in the linear ion trap
instrument: injected onto an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: where the spectral count of a given protein was normalized against the sum of the spectral counts of all proteins identified in an MS run
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM 1,4-dithiothreitol (DTT) at 60 °C for 30 min
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM 1,4-dithiothreitol (DTT) at 60 °C for 30 min
